palette_hint: Deep navy background #0D1B2A, primary text #E8F0F7, accent gold #F0A500, secondary accent electric teal #00C9B1
type_style: Headings in system Georgia serif at 700 weight for gravitas, body in system -apple-system/Segoe UI at 400–500 weight, airy and clean feel
description: Lumenos is a B2B SaaS marketing landing site for an AI-powered document clarity analyzer that detects ambiguity, jargon, and readability gaps in legal and compliance contracts.
constraints: Max content width 1100px centered with 24px horizontal padding on mobile and 64px on desktop; all sections padded 80px top/bottom
Elevation system: cards use box-shadow at three depths — level-1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), level-2: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), level-3: 0 20px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
Border-radius rhythm strictly 4px for inputs and small tags, 12px for cards and panels, 999px for pill buttons and badges
Every section alternates between a solid #0D1B2A base and a radial-gradient variant: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #112236 0%, #0D1B2A 70%) to create subtle depth

Decorative ::before pseudo-elements on hero and CTA sections render a large blurred gold ellipse (width:520px, height:320px, background:#F0A500, opacity:0.08, filter:blur(80px)) positioned absolutely behind content

page_specs.vision: Hero section with a bold serif headline 'Contracts That Speak Clearly' in 64px gold #F0A500 over navy, a two-sentence subheading explaining that Lumenos scans documents in seconds to surface confusing clauses before they become liabilities, and a teal pill CTA button 'Try Free for 14 Days'. Below the hero, a horizontal trust bar lists five well-known fictional enterprise clients — Verentis Legal, Caldex Insurance, Norrbridge Finance, Axelo Pharma, Oryx Compliance — each as a ghost-text wordmark separated by subtle vertical dividers, with the whole bar having a level-1 elevation card treatment.
page_specs.features: A 3-column card grid (stacking to 1 column on mobile) showcasing six features: Ambiguity Scanner, Jargon Density Score, Readability Heatmap, Clause Conflict Detector, Version Diff Clarity, and Multi-Language Audit. Each card has a teal icon placeholder drawn with CSS borders, a bold 18px feature name, a 2-sentence specific description, and level-2 elevation. Cards use 12px border-radius, a 1px border of rgba(0,201,177,0.2), and a subtle linear-gradient fill from #112236 to #0D1B2A.
page_specs.how-it-works: A numbered three-step process section using a horizontal timeline on desktop (vertical on mobile): Step 1 'Upload Your Document', Step 2 'Lumenos Analyzes in 8 Seconds', Step 3 'Receive Your Clarity Report'. Each step is a pill-shaped node connected by a gradient line linear-gradient(90deg, #F0A500, #00C9B1). Below the timeline, a realistic mock-report preview panel rendered entirely in HTML/CSS shows a fictional contract excerpt with highlighted spans in gold for ambiguous phrases and teal underlines for jargon terms, enclosed in a level-3 elevation card with 12px border-radius.
page_specs.pricing: Three pricing tiers displayed in a centered card row: Starter at $49/mo for solo practitioners (5 documents/month), Professional at $149/mo for legal teams up to 20 users (unlimited documents, API access), and Enterprise at custom pricing for compliance departments (SSO, audit logs, SLA). The Professional card is visually elevated with a gold top border (4px solid #F0A500), a level-3 shadow, and a 'Most Popular' pill badge in teal. All cards list exactly five feature bullets each using teal checkmark symbols built from CSS borders, and each has a pill CTA button.
page_specs.get-started: A full-width CTA section with the headline 'Clarity Is a Competitive Advantage' in 48px serif gold and a two-sentence paragraph explaining the free trial terms — no credit card, cancel anytime, onboarding call included. An inline two-field form (work email input + 'Start Free Trial' pill button in gold #F0A500 with navy text) sits centered below the text. The section background uses the decorative gold radial blur pseudo-element prominently, and below the form a row of three small reassurance badges — 'SOC 2 Type II', 'GDPR Ready', '99.9% Uptime' — each styled as 4px-radius tags with a teal border and ghost background.
